name: Zippy Beef Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 can cream of mushroom soup, condensed
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees.
2. Cook and stir ground beef until browned. Remove any excess fat.
3. Cook macaroni according to package instructions; drain well.
4. In an ungreased 2-quart casserole, combine all ingredients.
5. Cover and bake at 350 degrees for 40 minutes.
6. Uncover and sprinkle with crushed potato chips if desired. Bake for an additional 5 minutes.
